connection.title: Connection
connection.missingMessage: Add a compatible base URL, model, and API key before running AI actions.
connection.desktopOnly: AI provider secrets can only be configured in the desktop app right now.
connection.apiKeyStored: Stored securely. Enter a new key to replace it.
connection.privacyNote: Only the visible context attached to this action is sent. The whole document is not sent by default.

templates.continueWritingPrompt: Continue writing from the current position and keep the tone consistent with the surrounding content.
templates.ghostTextPrompt: Continue writing from the current cursor position as a short inline continuation. Keep it brief enough to preview as ghost text and return only the continuation text.
templates.newNotePrompt: Draft a self-contained Markdown note from the current context. Give it a clear title and useful section structure.
templates.workspaceRunPrompt:
Review the attached notes and return a coordinated workspace execution plan. Use exactly this structure:

<!-- ai-workspace-summary -->
- concise summary bullets
<!-- /ai-workspace-summary -->

For each task, output:
<!-- ai-workspace-task action="update-note" target="note name or path" title="Draft title" phase="optional phase name" depends-on="optional prior task target or title, optional second dependency" -->
# Draft content
...
<!-- /ai-workspace-task -->

Omit phase when a task belongs in the default phase. Omit depends-on when a task has no prerequisite. If you use phases, keep every task dependency within the same phase or an earlier phase; never make a task depend on a later phase. Use action="create-note" when the result should become a new note. The parser also accepts stage="..." for compatibility, but prefer phase="...". Return only the summary block and task blocks.
templates.insertUnderHeadingPrompt: Generate a new block that should be inserted under the current heading while staying aligned with the section above.
templates.reviewPrompt: Review the current block, point out concrete improvements, and keep the response concise.
templates.rewritePrompt: Rewrite the selected content to improve clarity and flow while preserving meaning and Markdown structure.
templates.summarizePrompt: Summarize the selected content while preserving the key meaning and Markdown structure.
templates.translatePrompt: Translate the selected content while preserving Markdown structure, links, tables, code fences, Mermaid, math, and front matter.
templates.generateBelowPrompt: Generate the next block below the current one and keep the tone aligned with the surrounding document.

mentions.hint: Use @note for the current note or @note(query) for another note. Use @heading for the current section or @heading(query) for a matching heading. Use @search(query) to attach top workspace hits.
mentions.noteAction: Attach the current note, or add a query inside @note(...) to attach another note.
mentions.headingAction: Attach the current heading section, or add a query inside @heading(...) to target another heading.
mentions.searchAction: Attach top search hits for a query inside @search(...).

error.currentHeadingUnavailable: No current heading section is available at the captured cursor position.

workspaceContext.title: Workspace Context
workspaceContext.detail: Attach additional notes from open tabs or the wider workspace without turning the AI flow into a separate agent surface.
workspaceContext.attachCurrentNote: Attach the current note as explicit context.
workspaceContext.runHint: Attached notes are ready. Use the workspace run template to draft coordinated multi-note tasks.
workspaceContext.runRequiresNotes: Attach at least one note before drafting a workspace execution run.

workspaceExecution.preflightLoadingDetail: Checking target notes, open-tab state, and create-note collisions.
workspaceExecution.preflightReadyDetail: All tasks are ready to run with the current editor state.
workspaceExecution.preflightWaitingDetail: Some tasks are waiting for earlier tasks to finish or produce their draft target.
workspaceExecution.preflightReviewDetail: Some tasks need review first, but they can still proceed safely.
workspaceExecution.preflightBlockedDetail: Some tasks are blocked by missing targets or unsaved changes.
workspaceExecution.preflightUnknownDetail: Preflight details are not available yet.
workspaceExecution.preflightTaskUpdateReady: "{{target}}" is open and ready for update.
workspaceExecution.preflightTaskWillOpen: "{{target}}" will be opened on demand before execution.
workspaceExecution.preflightTaskProducedByTask: Waiting for "{{task}}" to create the draft target first.
workspaceExecution.preflightTaskDependencyPhaseOrder: This phase depends on tasks scheduled later in the plan: {{dependencies}}.
workspaceExecution.preflightTaskDirty: "{{target}}" has unsaved changes and will block execution.
workspaceExecution.preflightTaskAmbiguous: "{{target}}" matched multiple likely notes. Narrow the target before executing.
workspaceExecution.preflightTaskLowConfidence: "{{target}}" matched loosely. Review the target before executing.
workspaceExecution.preflightTaskCreateExists: "{{target}}" already exists, so review the draft before replacing anything.
workspaceExecution.preflightTaskCreateReady: "{{target}}" looks clear for a new draft note.
workspaceExecution.resolveTargetDetail: Pick the intended note for this task when the current target is ambiguous or weak.
workspaceExecution.agentLogResumed: This task was already completed before the current agent run resumed.
workspaceExecution.agentLogResumedManualApply: This task was already completed by a manual apply before the current agent run resumed.
workspaceExecution.agentLogResumedManualOpenDraft: This task was already completed by opening its draft before the current agent run resumed.
workspaceExecution.agentLogResumedAgent: This task was already completed by an earlier agent run.
workspaceExecution.agentLogResumedAgentRun: This task was already completed by agent run {{runId}}.
workspaceExecution.phaseStalled: {{phase}} cannot continue automatically because none of its remaining tasks are runnable yet.
workspaceExecution.phaseStalledDependencies: {{phase}} cannot continue automatically because its remaining tasks are all waiting on: {{dependencies}}.
workspaceExecution.phaseBlockedByEarlierPhase: This task was not started because an earlier phase still has unfinished work: {{phase}}.
workspaceExecution.taskApplied: "{{target}}" was updated from the workspace task.
workspaceExecution.targetDirty: "{{target}}" has unsaved changes. Save or resolve that note before executing this task.
workspaceExecution.targetAmbiguous: "{{target}}" matched multiple likely notes. Narrow the target before executing this task.
workspaceExecution.targetLowConfidence: "{{target}}" matched loosely. Review or rename the target before executing this task.
